representativeMandates.heading: Representative Mandates
representativeMandates.description: A curated selection of transactions that reflect the complexity, scale, and diversity of our transactional experience. Details are shared in a concise and anonymised format, in line with confidentiality and regulatory considerations.

items.title: Mergers & Acquisitions
items.desc: Advised the promoters of a technology-enabled services company on the sale of a controlling stake to a strategic acquirer, including transaction structuring, legal due diligence, and negotiation of definitive agreements.
